constrains.note: every `uses:` ref must be an allow-listed publisher and SHA-pinned; no third-party change-filter actions

sectionHeadings: FR-02: Inline change-routing (no third-party filter action)
record.summary: The enterprise (EMU) constraint set for GitHub Actions: only allow-listed publishers may execute, so workflows route changes with inline git diff instead of third-party filter actions; every permitted third-party ref is SHA-pinned; the merge_group trigger ships inert until a repo admin enables the merge queue.
record.title: Enterprise Actions governance: the GitHub Actions allow-list, inline change-routing, and the merge queue
